applicability: Every app-owned record, file, preference, database row, credential, key, cache, queue, index, attachment, log buffer, backup candidate, and offline copy.
Every feature that changes data purpose, sensitivity, store, retention, deletion, backup, migration, or offline behavior.
exception_policy: A temporary exception binds the exact data class, store, affected artifact digest, compensating control, accountable owner, expiry, and removal plan; it cannot permit plaintext restricted storage, permanent retention, partial deletion, destructive migration, or unbounded offline data.
rationale: One canonical classification and explicit storage-to-deletion lifecycle prevents features and downstream standards from applying contradictory protection, retention, and recovery behavior.
review_cadence: At least annually and whenever a new data use, store, backup behavior, retention obligation, cryptographic policy, migration framework, or offline capability is introduced.
title: Data Lifecycle
